name: RSM (liquid reconstituted skim milk) (PMC4322847)
description: RSM (liquid reconstituted skim milk) — medium reported in PMC4322847 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC4322847 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.formulation_warning: workflow correction sparse; kept original — Real but complex/undefined lab medium (reconstituted skim milk); not chemically defined, so caseins/lactose/vitamins/trace elements are supplied en bloc by the powder and cannot be enumerated as individual BiGG metabolites. Current record listed the correct qualitative components (skim milk powder + CaCl2) but omitted amounts; corrected to add 10% w/v powder and 10 mM CaCl2. Oxygen kept facultative: paper does not state aeration (cultures held in sealed microcalorimeter ampoules at 40°C) and S. thermophilus is aerotolerant/facultative. Organism: Streptococcus thermophilus ST12.
provenance.verification_evidence: "LHSMP was suspended in distilled water to yield a final concentration of 10% (w v−1) milk solids, with addition of CaCl2 in final concentration of 10 mM." Milk was then "heated at 90°C for 30 min and cooled to 30°C immediately before the experiments."

uncovered.name: low-heat skim milk powder
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

uncovered.name: CaCl2
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

oxygen_note: no oxygen requirement specified; O2 available but not asserted
